message:
feat(mvcc): add input sanitization for BOCPD and conformal martingale configs

Prevent NaN/Inf/out-of-range values from poisoning change-point
detection by clamping invalid config fields to safe defaults at
construction time. Covers HazardFunction, ConjugateModel,
BocpdConfig, and ConformalMartingaleConfig with unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
